title: Written evidence submitted by Dr. Calestous Juma FRS HonFREng (GMC0023) to the Select Committee on Science and Technology, House of Commons
summary: This written evidence was submitted upon request to the House of Commons Select Committee on Science and Technology to address the question of "GM foods and application of the precautionary principle in Europe."
body: This written evidence was submitted upon request to the House of Commons Select Committee on Science and Technology to address the question of "GM foods and application of the precautionary principle in Europe." For more information about this hearing, click here . The latest from Belfer See more Recommended citation Juma, Calestous. Written evidence submitted by Dr. Calestous Juma FRS HonFREng (GMC0023) to the Select Committee on Science and Technology, House of Commons, United Kingdom, 07 May 2014.
